## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.12.4

### Cameras
- Restores the default camera live view request to the non-WebRTC `/device/startlive` endpoint.
- Keeps the experimental X-Sense WebRTC bridge behind the camera live view option.
- Prevents `webrtc://` live URLs from being passed to Home Assistant's normal stream worker.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the default non-WebRTC start-live request and the default stream path WebRTC URL guard.
- Confirms the full Python test suite and the Go bridge test pass with these changes.
